title: 💼 Talk through your CV (interview)
intro: An interviewer walks you through your background — like an oral CV exam. Answer out loud in full sentences. There's no single right answer: say something real, then compare with the model.

say: Buenos días. Para empezar, ¿cómo se llama y de dónde es?
Hola, cuénteme: ¿su nombre y de dónde viene?
beats.say_en: To start — your name and where you're from?
beats.hint: Give your name and where you're from. (Me llamo… / Soy de…)
beats.model: Me llamo ___ y soy de ___, en Estados Unidos.
beats.model_en: My name is ___ and I'm from ___, in the United States.

beats.say_en: What do you do currently? / Tell me about your current job.
beats.hint: Say your job and one thing you do. (Trabajo como… / Me dedico a…)
beats.model: Trabajo como ___. Me encargo de ___ y trabajo con ___.
beats.model_en: I work as a ___. I'm in charge of ___ and I work with ___.

say: Cuénteme sobre su experiencia. ¿Dónde ha trabajado antes?
beats.say_en: Tell me about your experience — where have you worked before?
beats.hint: Mention past roles. (Antes trabajé en… / Tengo ___ años de experiencia)
beats.model: Antes trabajé en ___ durante ___ años, donde aprendí a ___.
beats.model_en: Before, I worked at ___ for ___ years, where I learned to ___.

beats.say_en: What did you study? / Tell me about your education.
beats.hint: Say what and where you studied. (Estudié… en…)
beats.model_en: I studied ___ at the university of ___.

beats.say_en: What are your strengths? / Why should we choose you?
beats.hint: Name 1–2 strengths with an example. (Soy… / Se me da bien…)
beats.model: Soy organizado y aprendo rápido. Por ejemplo, ___.
beats.model_en: I'm organized and I learn quickly. For example, ___.

say: Por último, ¿por qué le interesa esto?
¿Cuáles son sus planes para el futuro?
beats.say_en: Finally, why are you interested? / What are your future plans?
beats.hint: Give a reason or a goal. (Me interesa porque… / Quiero…)
beats.model: Me interesa porque quiero ___ y creo que puedo aportar ___.
beats.model_en: I'm interested because I want to ___ and I think I can contribute ___.

outro: You just talked through your whole CV in Spanish. Do it a few times and it becomes automatic — exactly how the oral exams work. 💼
